2. Accordingly, the Director General of Police, Maharashtra State, Shri. the Central Administrative
Orders of Tribunals / Courts, Model Code of Conduct for Elections, Law and Order,
Further appropriate action should be taken keeping in mind, etc.
3. This Government Order, as specified in Section 22-N of the Maharashtra Police Act, is competent.
Issuance is being done with the approval of the authority.
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
